title: Section 1: Accommodation Enquiry
sentences: Good morning, how can I help you?
I am looking for a furnished apartment near the university.
What is your budget per month?
I can afford up to eight hundred pounds including utilities.
We have a nice two-bedroom flat with a balcony and garage.
Is there a bus stop nearby? I do not have a car.
Yes, there is a bus stop just five minutes away on foot.
The landlord requires a deposit of one month's rent.
When would you like to move in?
I would like to move in at the beginning of next month.

title: Section 2: Campus Tour Guide
sentences: Welcome to the University of Riverside, everyone.
Our campus was established over one hundred years ago.
The main library is open twenty-four hours during the exam period.
The science laboratory was renovated just last year.
Students can access the sports centre free of charge.
The student union organizes various activities every week.
There is a health centre located behind the main building.
International students should register at the admissions office.
The cafeteria offers a variety of vegetarian options.
I hope you enjoy your tour of our beautiful campus.

title: Section 3: Academic Discussion
sentences: Our group presentation is due in two weeks.
We need to discuss the topic of climate change and its effects.
I have already started reading several academic journals on this subject.
The professor emphasized the importance of reliable references.
We should divide the work equally among the three of us.
I will prepare the slides for the introduction and conclusion.
Can you research the statistics on carbon emissions?
We must submit a bibliography with at least ten sources.
Let us meet again on Friday to check our progress.
I am confident our presentation will be very successful.

title: Section 4: Marine Biology Lecture
sentences: Today I will talk about the impact of pollution on marine life.
Plastic waste in the ocean has increased dramatically over the past decade.
Scientists estimate that millions of marine animals die each year.
Coral reefs are particularly vulnerable to changes in water temperature.
The government has introduced new legislation to protect these habitats.
Research shows that some species have declined by over fifty percent.
Conservation efforts have had some positive results in recent years.
Individuals can also contribute by reducing their use of plastic.
International cooperation is essential to address this global problem.
Next week we will discuss the role of biodiversity in ocean ecosystems.

title: Section 1: Job Interview
sentences: Thank you for coming in for this interview today.
Could you tell us about your previous work experience?
I worked as a marketing assistant for two years.
My main responsibility was managing social media campaigns.
I also have experience in customer service and communication.
What do you consider to be your greatest strength?
I am very organized and I work well under pressure.
The position requires occasional travel to other cities.
Would you be available to start at the beginning of July?
We will contact you within a week to let you know our decision.
